---
id: create-project
title: "Create a project"
description: "Creates a new empty project in the specified workspace."
sidebar_label: "Create a project"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/apis-tools/hub-api-saas/specifications/hub-api
custom_edit_url: null
hide_send_button: true
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create a project"}
></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/projects"}
  context={"endpoint"}
></MethodEndpoint>

Creates a new empty project in the specified workspace.

<Heading id={"request"} as={"h2"} className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails parameters={undefined}></ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{
    required: true,
    content: {
      "application/json": {
        schema: {
          type: "object",
          additionalProperties: false,
          required: ["name", "workspaceKey"],
          example: {
            name: "Payment Flow",
            workspaceKey: "0108f0ef-5c76-4a75-a602-45a9f04554fd",
          },
          properties: {
            name: {
              description: "The name of the project.",
              type: "string",
              minLength: 1,
              maxLength: 255,
            },
            workspaceKey: {
              description: "The key of the workspace this project belongs to.",
              allOf: [
                {
                  description: "System-generated key for a workspace.",
                  type: "string",
                  format: "WorkspaceKey",
                  "x-semantic-type": "WorkspaceKey",
                  example: "0108f0ef-5c76-4a75-a602-45a9f04554fd",
                  title: "WorkspaceKey",
                },
              ],
            },
          },
          title: "ProjectCreateRequest",
        },
      },
    },
  }}
></RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{
    "200": {
      description: "The project was created successfully.",
      content: {
        "application/json": {
          schema: {
            type: "object",
            example: {
              projectKey: "28b47b0a-364c-4dbe-9836-41ab371c15b2",
              name: "Payment Flow",
              workspaceKey: "0108f0ef-5c76-4a75-a602-45a9f04554fd",
              created: "2025-02-01T08:00:00.000Z",
              createdBy: { name: "Jane Doe", email: "jane.doe@example.com" },
              updated: "2025-06-10T14:22:00.000Z",
              updatedBy: { name: "Jane Doe", email: "jane.doe@example.com" },
            },
            required: [
              "projectKey",
              "name",
              "workspaceKey",
              "created",
              "createdBy",
              "updated",
              "updatedBy",
            ],
            properties: {
              projectKey: {
                description: "The unique key identifying this project.",
                allOf: [
                  {
                    description: "System-generated key for a project.",
                    type: "string",
                    format: "ProjectKey",
                    "x-semantic-type": "ProjectKey",
                    example: "28b47b0a-364c-4dbe-9836-41ab371c15b2",
                    title: "ProjectKey",
                  },
                ],
              },
              name: { description: "The name of the project.", type: "string" },
              workspaceKey: {
                description:
                  "The key of the workspace this project belongs to.",
                allOf: [
                  {
                    description: "System-generated key for a workspace.",
                    type: "string",
                    format: "WorkspaceKey",
                    "x-semantic-type": "WorkspaceKey",
                    example: "0108f0ef-5c76-4a75-a602-45a9f04554fd",
                    title: "WorkspaceKey",
                  },
                ],
              },
              created: {
                description: "The timestamp when the project was created.",
                type: "string",
                format: "date-time",
              },
              createdBy: {
                description: "The user who created the project.",
                allOf: [
                  {
                    type: "object",
                    description: "A reference to a user.",
                    required: ["name", "email"],
                    properties: {
                      name: {
                        description: "The display name of the user.",
                        type: "string",
                      },
                      email: {
                        description: "The email address of the user.",
                        type: "string",
                        format: "email",
                      },
                    },
                    title: "UserReference",
                  },
                ],
              },
              updated: {
                description: "The timestamp when the project was last updated.",
                type: "string",
                format: "date-time",
              },
              updatedBy: {
                description: "The user who last updated the project.",
                allOf: [
                  {
                    type: "object",
                    description: "A reference to a user.",
                    required: ["name", "email"],
                    properties: {
                      name: {
                        description: "The display name of the user.",
                        type: "string",
                      },
                      email: {
                        description: "The email address of the user.",
                        type: "string",
                        format: "email",
                      },
                    },
                    title: "UserReference",
                  },
                ],
              },
            },
            title: "ProjectResult",
          },
        },
      },
    },
    "400": {
      description: "The provided data is not valid.",
      content: {
        "application/problem+json": {
          schema: {
            description:
              "A Problem detail object as described in [RFC 9457](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc9457). There may be additional properties specific to the problem type.\n",
            type: "object",
            required: ["type", "title", "status", "detail", "instance"],
            properties: {
              type: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri",
                description: "A URI identifying the problem type.",
                default: "about:blank",
                example:
                  "https://docs.camunda.io/api/v2.0/problem-types/bad-request",
              },
              title: {
                type: "string",
                description: "A summary of the problem type.",
                example: "Bad Request",
              },
              status: {
                type: "integer",
                format: "int32",
                description: "The HTTP status code for this problem.",
                example: 400,
                minimum: 400,
                maximum: 600,
              },
              detail: {
                type: "string",
                description: "An explanation of the problem in more detail.",
                example:
                  "Request property [maxJobsToActivates] cannot be parsed",
              },
              instance: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri-reference",
                description:
                  "A URI path identifying the origin of the problem.",
                example: "/v2/jobs/activation",
              },
            },
            title: "ProblemDetail",
          },
          example: {
            type: "about:blank",
            title: "Bad Request",
            status: 400,
            detail:
              "Validation failed for request body: 'name' must not be blank.",
            instance: "/api/v2/files",
          },
        },
      },
    },
    "401": {
      description: "The request lacks valid authentication credentials.",
      headers: { "WWW-Authenticate": { schema: { type: "string" } } },
      content: {
        "application/problem+json": {
          schema: {
            description:
              "A Problem detail object as described in [RFC 9457](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc9457). There may be additional properties specific to the problem type.\n",
            type: "object",
            required: ["type", "title", "status", "detail", "instance"],
            properties: {
              type: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri",
                description: "A URI identifying the problem type.",
                default: "about:blank",
                example:
                  "https://docs.camunda.io/api/v2.0/problem-types/bad-request",
              },
              title: {
                type: "string",
                description: "A summary of the problem type.",
                example: "Bad Request",
              },
              status: {
                type: "integer",
                format: "int32",
                description: "The HTTP status code for this problem.",
                example: 400,
                minimum: 400,
                maximum: 600,
              },
              detail: {
                type: "string",
                description: "An explanation of the problem in more detail.",
                example:
                  "Request property [maxJobsToActivates] cannot be parsed",
              },
              instance: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri-reference",
                description:
                  "A URI path identifying the origin of the problem.",
                example: "/v2/jobs/activation",
              },
            },
            title: "ProblemDetail",
          },
          example: {
            type: "about:blank",
            title: "Unauthorized",
            status: 401,
            detail:
              "The supplied authentication is not authorized to access this resource.",
            instance: "/api/v2/files",
          },
        },
      },
    },
    "403": {
      description: "Forbidden. The request is not allowed.",
      content: {
        "application/problem+json": {
          schema: {
            description:
              "A Problem detail object as described in [RFC 9457](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc9457). There may be additional properties specific to the problem type.\n",
            type: "object",
            required: ["type", "title", "status", "detail", "instance"],
            properties: {
              type: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri",
                description: "A URI identifying the problem type.",
                default: "about:blank",
                example:
                  "https://docs.camunda.io/api/v2.0/problem-types/bad-request",
              },
              title: {
                type: "string",
                description: "A summary of the problem type.",
                example: "Bad Request",
              },
              status: {
                type: "integer",
                format: "int32",
                description: "The HTTP status code for this problem.",
                example: 400,
                minimum: 400,
                maximum: 600,
              },
              detail: {
                type: "string",
                description: "An explanation of the problem in more detail.",
                example:
                  "Request property [maxJobsToActivates] cannot be parsed",
              },
              instance: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri-reference",
                description:
                  "A URI path identifying the origin of the problem.",
                example: "/v2/jobs/activation",
              },
            },
            title: "ProblemDetail",
          },
          example: {
            type: "about:blank",
            title: "Forbidden",
            status: 403,
            detail:
              "Operation not allowed. Ensure your API credentials have the required permissions.",
            instance: "/api/v2/files/1eadb755-662f-43bd-81d1-cf36f39a0a03",
          },
        },
      },
    },
    "500": {
      description: "An internal error occurred while processing the request.",
      content: {
        "application/problem+json": {
          schema: {
            description:
              "A Problem detail object as described in [RFC 9457](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc9457). There may be additional properties specific to the problem type.\n",
            type: "object",
            required: ["type", "title", "status", "detail", "instance"],
            properties: {
              type: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri",
                description: "A URI identifying the problem type.",
                default: "about:blank",
                example:
                  "https://docs.camunda.io/api/v2.0/problem-types/bad-request",
              },
              title: {
                type: "string",
                description: "A summary of the problem type.",
                example: "Bad Request",
              },
              status: {
                type: "integer",
                format: "int32",
                description: "The HTTP status code for this problem.",
                example: 400,
                minimum: 400,
                maximum: 600,
              },
              detail: {
                type: "string",
                description: "An explanation of the problem in more detail.",
                example:
                  "Request property [maxJobsToActivates] cannot be parsed",
              },
              instance: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri-reference",
                description:
                  "A URI path identifying the origin of the problem.",
                example: "/v2/jobs/activation",
              },
            },
            title: "ProblemDetail",
          },
          example: {
            type: "about:blank",
            title: "Internal Server Error",
            status: 500,
            detail:
              "An unexpected error occurred while processing your request. Please try again later.",
            instance: "/api/v2/files",
          },
        },
      },
    },
  }}
></StatusCodes>
